title: alsine saxifraga
intro: Alsine saxifraga, also known as saxifrage, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the saxifragaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for centuries due to its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is valued for its health benefits, such as treating kidney stones and gravel, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. Saxifrage can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its therapeutic effects.
